test.create_query: CREATE TABLE large_int (a Int32, b Int32, c Int32, d Int32, e Int32, f Int32, g Int32, h Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE large_str (a Int32, b Int32, c Int32, s1 String, s2 String, s3 String, s4 String, s5 String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE small1 (a Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE small2 (b Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE small3 (c Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE small1_dup (a Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE small2_dup (b Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE small3_dup (c Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO large_int SELECT number % 10000, number % 12500, number % 11000, number * 2, number * 3, number * 4, number * 5, number * 6 FROM numbers(100000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO large_str SELECT number % 10000, number % 12500, number % 11000, toString(number), toString(number * 2), toString(number * 3), toString(number * 4), toString(number * 5) FROM numbers(100000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small1 SELECT number FROM numbers(8000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small2 SELECT number FROM numbers(10000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small3 SELECT number FROM numbers(9000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small1_dup SELECT number FROM numbers(8000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small1_dup SELECT number FROM numbers(8000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small2_dup SELECT number FROM numbers(10000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small2_dup SELECT number FROM numbers(10000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small3_dup SELECT number FROM numbers(9000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO small3_dup SELECT number FROM numbers(9000) ORDER BY rand()
test.query: SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s ON l.a = s.a ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s ON l.a = s.a ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 1000 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s ON l.a = s.a ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s ON l.a = s.a ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 1000 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash'

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2 s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3 s3 ON l.c = s3.c LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2 s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3 s3 ON l.c = s3.c ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2 s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3 s3 ON l.c = s3.c ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 1000 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2 s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3 s3 ON l.c = s3.c FORMAT NULL SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2_dup s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3_dup s3 ON l.c = s3.c LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2_dup s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3_dup s3 ON l.c = s3.c ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 10 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2_dup s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3_dup s3 ON l.c = s3.c ORDER BY l.a LIMIT 1000 SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1_dup s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2_dup s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3_dup s3 ON l.c = s3.c FORMAT NULL SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false

SELECT * FROM {large_table} l JOIN small1 s1 ON l.a = s1.a JOIN small2_dup s2 ON l.b = s2.b JOIN small3_dup s3 ON l.c = s3.c FORMAT NULL SETTINGS query_plan_min_columns_for_join_lazy_indexing = {lazy_indexing}, join_algorithm = 'hash', query_plan_join_swap_table = false
